assert._comment: Performance floor: 0.50. CI targets production (pueblofoodmap.com) because MAPBOX_PREVIEW_TOKEN is absent — see issue #161 item 2.2. Production CI max across 2 measured runs (2026-06-21): 0.54, 0.54 (all values: [0.47,0.53,0.54] and [0.42,0.53,0.54]). Gate set to 0.50 for reliable anti-flake margin (LHCI uses optimistic/max of 3 runs). After #202 bundle change merges to main and deploys, re-measure and raise toward 0.65 → 0.70. Aspirational field target: ~0.70.
